notes: History affects ranking/framing only; classification is based on current text and context.
KEEP preserves positive single-word and phrase evidence separately from student-facing task deduplication.
v1.6 final gates may move weak single-word KEEP evidence to internal analytics and suppress weak ENHANCE suggestions.
v1.6.2 allows selected single-word KEEP items to feed contextual synonym training when insertion and subject/scope QA pass.
v1.6.3 separates contextual synonym work from main ENHANCE and uses quota-aware strict recovery before final release.
v1.6.4 audits all single-word KEEP/internal candidates for contextual synonym potential; only sentence-validated alternatives become student tasks.
